name: Time Series Analysis
description: Analyze trends, patterns, and seasonality in time-based data

config.sql:
SELECT 
  date,
  sales,
  visitors,
  orders,
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) as year,
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) as month,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM date) as day,
  EXTRACT(DOW FROM date) as day_of_week,
  EXTRACT(WEEK FROM date) as week_of_year
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY date

SELECT 
  date,
  sales,
  visitors,
  orders,
  AVG(sales) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_7_day,
  AVG(sales) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_30_day,
  sales / AVG(sales) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ratio_to_7day_avg
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY date

SELECT 
  date,
  sales,
  LAG(sales, 7) OVER (ORDER BY date) as sales_7_days_ago,
  sales - LAG(sales, 7) OVER (ORDER BY date) as wow_change,
  CASE 
    WHEN LAG(sales, 7) OVER (ORDER BY date) > 0 
    THEN ((sales - LAG(sales, 7) OVER (ORDER BY date)) / LAG(sales, 7) OVER (ORDER BY date)) * 100
    ELSE NULL
  END as wow_growth_pct
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY date
